category_sources: Official GitHub repository description at https://github.com/Lifailon/lazyjournal describes log viewing across journald, auditd, file system, containers, Compose, and Kubernetes.
source_facts.description says it is a TUI for logs from journalctl, file system, Docker, Podman, and Kubernetes pods.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository name is Lifailon/lazyjournal.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains install and usage documentation.
Official GitHub repository exposes a Wiki tab.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/Lifailon/lazyjournal, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub repository description confirms journald, containers, Compose stacks, Kubernetes pods, highlighting, and filtering.
source_facts.description lists journalctl, Docker, Podman, Kubernetes, and file-system logs.
